SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: PRE_ICL_DAYS_MO_2M 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS Files) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This variable was new in 2013. Starting in 2016, CMS changed how they describe pharmacy networks. 
The mail order pharmacies are currently referred to as standard mail order pharmacies. There is no 
change in the meaning of the variable, and the data values are the same over time.
